theme.name: Aqua

tokens.--x-aqua-gel-close: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 18%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3) 30%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 48%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 100%, rgba(255, 158, 143, 0.9) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(to bottom, #e8584b, #b8241a)
tokens.--x-aqua-gel-minimize: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 18%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3) 30%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 48%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 100%, rgba(255, 235, 160, 0.9) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(to bottom, #f6b620, #cf8d12)
tokens.--x-aqua-gel-zoom: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 18%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3) 30%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 48%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 100%, rgba(190, 245, 170, 0.9) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(to bottom, #4fc94f, #1da522)
tokens.--x-aqua-gel-inactive: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 18%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3) 30%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 48%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 100%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(to bottom, #cfcfcf, #a8a8a8)
tokens.--x-aqua-gel-blue: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 60%), linear-gradient(to bottom, #a7cdf6 0%, #5a9bee 45%, #2f6fde 50%, #71b3f4 100%)
